description: As a Mechanical BIM Technician working on the pre-loaded FZK-Haus residential building IFC model, model the primary mechanical plant equipment for a residential heating system. Create 3D representations for a water boiler (IfcBoiler, PredefinedType: WATER), a storage tank (IfcTank, PredefinedType: STORAGE), and a circulation pump (IfcPump). Define an IfcSystem named 'Heating Plant' and assign all three pieces of equipment to it. Save the enriched project to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_heating_plant.ifc. Note that correct IFC classes, predefined types, and system grouping are the primary requirements.
